# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

apiVersion: v1
kind: OpenIDConnectConfig
metadata:
  name: service-account-oidc
  namespace: default
spec:
  client_id_with_audience: "372503386677.apps.googleusercontent.com"
  subject_type: email
  authorized_scopes:
    - 'openid'
    - 'profile'
    - 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform'
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: service-account
  namespace: default
---
apiVersion: iam.googleapis.com/v1
kind: IAMServiceAccountKey
metadata:
  name: key
  namespace: default
spec:
  service_account_id: service-account
  iam_type: RSA_SHA256
outputConfig:
  version: 'v1'
  encoding: PEM
---
apiVersion: apiregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: APIService
metadata:
  name: custom-api
spec:
  service:
    name: grpc://localhost:50051
  insecureSkipTLS: true
  group: "example.com"
  version: "v1"
  openAPIV3Schema:
    type: string
  openapispec: |-
    info:
      title: Custom API
      description: Example custom API for the service account.
      version: v1
    servers:
      - url: http://localhost:8080
